Gowtham

Robotics Engineer • ROS2 • Navigation • Perception

I build autonomous mobile robots using ROS2 Nav2, costmaps, TF, SLAM, and embedded systems. I work on navigation pipelines, depth/LiDAR obstacle detection, and real-world robotic deployments.

Projects

Autonomous Mobile Robot — Navigation Stack
ROS2 navigation integration, obstacle avoidance using LIDAR and depth camera, custom costmaps and recovery behaviors.
GitHub Details
Embedded Motor Controller
STM32-based motor controller with CAN bus, PI velocity loop, and field-oriented control experiments.
